commentaries.author: Clement Of Alexandria
commentaries.content: If, then, "the harvest is plenteous, but the labourers few "it is incumbent on us "to pray "that there may be as great abundance of labourers as possible.

commentaries.author: Cornelius a Lapide
commentaries.content: The harvest truly is great, but the labourers are few. See S. Matthew 9:37.
